meta.project: IHN TOPUP - Digital Products & Gaming Top-Up Platform

product_overview: IHN TOPUP is a comprehensive Next.js-based e-commerce platform tailored for digital products and gaming top-ups. It offers a seamless marketplace for gaming currency, digital vouchers, and a robust reseller program integrated with Firebase backend services for real-time functionality and secure transactions.
core_goals: Provide a dynamic marketplace for gaming digital products including top-ups and vouchers.
Enable seamless user authentication, profile, and wallet management.
Support reseller program with wholesale pricing and dedicated dashboards.
Offer admins a powerful dashboard for managing products, orders, users, financials, and content.
Ensure secure, reliable, and performant payment and order processing across multiple payment methods.
Deliver an engaging user experience with responsive design, rich UI components, and real-time notifications.
key_features: Dynamic product catalog with category filtering, search, and detailed product views.
User authentication using Firebase Email/Password with registration, login, and profile management.
Comprehensive order management with status tracking, history, and refunds.
Digital wallet with top-up, balance transfer, and transaction history capabilities.
Multi-payment gateway integration including bKash, Nagad, Rocket with manual payment processing.
Coupon system for discounts during checkout.
Reseller application process with admin approval and dedicated reseller dashboard.
Admin panel managing orders, users, products, resellers, financial operations, and site content.
Notification mechanisms via Telegram and in-app toast messages.
Progressive Web App (PWA) features with offline support and install prompts.
UX enhancements including animated backgrounds, loading states, and floating support buttons.
Ban system enforcing user restrictions and preventing unauthorized transactions.
user_flow_summary: Users register or log in using Firebase authentication with email/password.
Users browse the dynamic product catalog with filtering and search options.
Users view product details, select options, enter game UIDs, and add products to their cart.
At checkout, users can apply coupons, select payment methods (wallet, coin fund, manual payment), and submit orders.
Users manage their wallet by viewing balance, topping up via supported payment gateways, and transferring balance to other users.
Users can apply to become resellers via a detailed application form and track application status.
Resellers access a dedicated dashboard to order wholesale products and manage their reseller wallet.
Admins access a comprehensive dashboard to monitor and manage orders, users, products, reseller applications, finances, and site content.
Admins can update order statuses, process refunds, manage user bans, and approve reseller applications.
Users receive notifications through Telegram and in-app alerts about order status, wallet activity, and administrative messages.
validation_criteria: All user authentication flows must be secure with email verification and proper session management.
Product listings, categories, and search functions must dynamically update from Firestore and reflect accurate stock and pricing.
Order processing should correctly update order statuses, reflect refunds, and trigger notifications.
wallet top-ups and transfers must update balances accurately with fee calculations and history logs.
Coupon codes should validate correctly and apply discounts during checkout.
Reseller applications must be submitted, stored, and processed with status tracking and admin approval/rejection.
Admin panels must reflect real-time metrics, allow full CRUD operations on products, users, orders, and content.
Notification systems (Telegram + in-app) should send timely and correct updates to users and admins.
The PWA features should enable app installation, offline access, and smooth user experience.
Ban system should effectively prevent restricted users from performing transactions or accessing protected features.
UI must remain responsive across devices with smooth animations and loading states.
